title: Kanziwck Amphitheatre
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Max_Rebo_band_poster.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Poster advertising the [[Max Rebo Band/Legends|Max Rebo Band]] at the Kanziwck Amphitheatre]]

The '''Kanziwck Amphitheater''' was an amphitheatre where the [[Max Rebo Band/Legends|Max Rebo Band]] once performed.

{{Struct-stub}}
